title: gleichenia dolosa
intro: Gleichenia dolosa, also known as the 'false fern', is a type of fern species that belongs to the family Gleicheniaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Gleichenia dolosa include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant, which can help protect the body from oxidative stress and cell damage. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
